title: Bootstrap quality gates for self-healing
prompt: In this repository, add minimal but meaningful quality gates so pipeline gate can run: (1) add `pnpm test` and `pnpm check` scripts in package.json; (2) add at least one node:test smoke test under test/ that validates key pipeline files exist and can be imported without throwing; (3) make sure both scripts pass. Keep changes minimal and do not alter pipeline behavior.
commitMessage: build: bootstrap test and check gates for self-healing
